Total Breakthrough Training
“Juaquin was now in that kind of shock, waiting for that call back,
the reset button.”
When that happens, you want to see what is shut down in your client’s
world, and what is still active in their world, because that will show you
where the person still has hope and what they might be holding out
for.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 9 --

Total Breakthrough Training
Mode of Being- The way you process
information on the deepest level
One of the principles of coaching is that you really want to understand
your client’s deepest desires, because that desire is the energy that will
create growth and make things happen. Now, people have this desire
when they’re really productive and moving forwards, but they also have
these desires when they’re disappointed and paralyzed.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 9 --

Total Breakthrough Training
Juaquin’s 	Mode of Being is to be a team player
How does Tony use this in his coaching?
How can you use your client’s mode of being to help
them grow?
What happens if your client’s mode of being is very
different from yours?
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 9 --

Total Breakthrough Training
External Blame Focus
When in shock a person focuses on their past.
What is out of their control.
SI Solution
Find your Client’s Mode of Being what they focus on in a happy
meaningful way. This gives you a way to help them in the future. You
know this mode of being has helped in the past.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

Total Breakthrough Training
Assignments
Strategize ways you can help people similar to Juaquin in your town
or city. Use their Mode of Being when you work on your
assignments.
What directives can you give them to do.
What if they are an artist/creator?
A homemaker/observer?
A Lawyer/truth seeker?

Total Breakthrough Training
Important question Tony asks:
“Where is discipline in your life today?”
Important Relationship Strength
Patience – the ability to wait, plan, and finally get what he
wants, the way he wants it. The ability to be apart and keep
the relationship strong. 	The ability to be friends first. 	The
ability to come back after a stroke and relearn all the basics.
